ListImages.marker: The starting position for paginated list queries, a system-generated string
ListImages.maxKeys: Maximum number of items per page, typically no more than 1000; default is 1000
ListImages.imageType: Specifies the image type to query: All, System, BbcSystem, Custom, Integration, Sharing, GpuBccSystem, GpuBccCustom, FpgaBccSystem, FpgaBccCustom, EbcTotal, EbcSystem, EbcCustom; default is All
ListImages.imageName: Filters images by name; returns only images whose names contain the specified string
